description.value:
Lantern implements shine the light of revelation to part shadows and expose truth. You might use a common glass lantern, torch, paper lantern, or other similar light source. Lantern implements are associated with the harrow suit of stars and the astrological signs of the lantern bearer and the archer.

Initiate Benefit

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.tBI15UqeQH7PLzAK inline]

Adept Benefit

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.QK5ojonup9AQBg4O inline]

Intensify Vulnerability

Your lantern's light flares and burns bright, leaving no shadows in which secrets and enemies can hide. The emanation of your lantern's aura doubles in size. Against the target of your Exploit Vulnerability, the status bonuses from the lantern's initiate benefit increase to +2. The creature takes a –2 status penalty to Deception checks and Stealth checks as long as it's within the aura. Additionally, the target of your Exploit Vulnerability can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] while it's in the lantern's aura, though it still can potentially become hidden or undetected using cover or means other than the concealed condition.

Paragon Benefit

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.k9d3rDhYnHwLI8XF inline]
